documents.name: Accordion
documents.summary: The accordion component lets users show and hide sections of related content on a page

documents.name: Addresses
documents.summary: Help users provide an address

documents.name: Back link
documents.summary: Use the back link component to help users go back to the previous page in a multi-page transaction

documents.name: Bank details
documents.summary: How to ask users for their bank details

documents.name: Breadcrumbs
documents.summary: Help users orientate themselves and navigate pages within a hierarchical structure

documents.name: Button
documents.summary: Use the button component to help users carry out an action

documents.name: Character count
documents.summary: Tell users how many characters or words they can enter into a textarea

documents.name: Check a service is suitable
documents.summary: Ask users questions to help them work out if they can or should use your service

documents.name: Check answers
documents.summary: Let users check their answers before submitting information to a service

documents.name: Checkboxes
documents.summary: Let users select one or more options by using the checkboxes component

documents.name: Complete multiple tasks
documents.summary: Task lists help users understand tasks involved in completing a transaction, the order they should complete tasks in and when they have completed tasks

documents.name: Confirm a phone number
documents.summary: Identifying users when they sign in

documents.name: Confirm an email address
documents.summary: Use an email confirmation loop to check that a user has access to a specific email

documents.name: Confirmation pages
documents.summary: Let users know they’ve completed a transaction

documents.name: Contact a department or service team
documents.summary: Contact a department or service team

documents.name: Cookie banner
documents.summary: Allow users to accept or reject cookies which are not essential to making your service work.

documents.name: Cookies page
documents.summary: Tell users about the cookies you’re setting on their device and let them accept or reject different types of non-essential cookies.

documents.name: Create a username
documents.summary: Help users to create a unique and memorable username to sign into a service with

documents.name: Create accounts
documents.summary: Help users create an account for your service

documents.name: Date input
documents.summary: Use the date input component to help users enter a memorable date

documents.name: Dates
documents.summary: Help users enter or select a date

documents.name: Details
documents.summary: Make a page easier to scan by letting users reveal more detailed information only if they need it

documents.name: Email addresses
documents.summary: Help users enter a valid email address

documents.name: Equality information
documents.summary: This pattern explains how to ask users for equality information

documents.name: Error message
documents.summary: When there's a validation error, use an error message to explain what went wrong and how to fix it

documents.name: Error summary
documents.summary: Use an error summary when there is a validation error

documents.name: Exit a page quickly
documents.summary: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

documents.name: Exit this page
documents.summary: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

documents.name: Fieldset
documents.summary: Use the fieldset component to group related form inputs

documents.name: File upload
documents.summary: Help users select and upload a file

documents.name: GOV.UK footer
documents.summary: The footer provides copyright, licensing and other information about your service and department

documents.name: Generic header
documents.summary: A generic header to help services not on GOV.UK

documents.name: GOV.UK header
documents.summary: The GOV.UK header shows users that they are on GOV.UK

documents.name: Inset text
documents.summary: Use the inset text component to differentiate a block of text from the content that surrounds it

documents.name: Interruption pages
documents.summary: Pause the user journey to give them important information

documents.name: Names
documents.summary: Help users correctly enter their name

documents.name: National Insurance numbers
documents.summary: Ask users to provide their National Insurance number

documents.name: Navigate a service
documents.summary: Help users know they’re using your service and navigate around it

documents.name: Notification banner
documents.summary: Use a notification banner to tell the user about something they need to know about, but that’s not directly related to the page content

documents.name: Page not found pages
documents.summary: A page not found tells someone we cannot find the page they were trying to view. They are also known as 404 pages.

documents.name: Pagination
documents.summary: Help users navigate collections of numbered pages like search results

documents.name: Panel
documents.summary: Use the Panel component to display important information in within confirmation and interruption pages

documents.name: Password input
documents.summary: Help users accessibly enter passwords

documents.name: Passwords
documents.summary: Help users to create and enter secure and memorable passwords

documents.name: Payment card details
documents.summary: How to ask users for their payment card details

documents.name: Phase banner
documents.summary: Use the phase banner component to show users your service is still being worked on

documents.name: Phone numbers
documents.summary: Help users enter a valid phone number

documents.name: There is a problem with the service pages
documents.summary: This is a page that tells someone there is something wrong with the service. They are also known as 500 pages

documents.name: Question pages
documents.summary: Follow this pattern whenever you need to ask users questions within your service

documents.name: Radios
documents.summary: Let users select a single option from a list using the radios component

documents.name: Select
documents.summary: Help users select an item from a list

documents.name: Service navigation
documents.summary: Service navigation helps users understand that they’re using your service and lets them navigate around your service

documents.name: Service unavailable pages
documents.summary: This is a page that tells someone a service is unavailable. It should say when the service will be available or what to do if it is permanently closed

documents.name: Skip link
documents.summary: Use the skip link component to help keyboard-only users skip to the main content on a page

documents.name: Start using a service
documents.summary: Create a starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

documents.name: Step by step navigation
documents.summary: A starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

documents.name: Summary list
documents.summary: Use the summary list to summarise information, for example, a user’s responses at the end of a form.

documents.name: Table
documents.summary: Use the table component to make information easier to compare and scan for users

documents.name: Tabs
documents.summary: Tabs can be a helpful way of letting users quickly switch between related information

documents.name: Tag
documents.summary: The Tag component indicates the status of something, such as an item on a task list or a phase banner

documents.name: Task list
documents.summary: The task list component displays all the tasks a user needs to do, and allows users to easily identify which ones are done and which they still need to do.

documents.name: Text input
documents.summary: Help users enter information with the text input component

documents.name: Textarea
documents.summary: Help users provide detailed information using the textarea component

documents.name: Understand the impact of an emergency on your service
Recover from validation errors
documents.summary: Check the answers users give to make sure they’re valid - and if there’s an error, tell them what's wrong and how to fix it

documents.name: Warning text
documents.summary: Use the warning text component when you need to warn users about something important, such as legal consequences of an action, or lack of action, that they might take
